caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, sits in a recording studio before a gray acoustic foam wall. He is positioned behind a professional silver microphone held by a black boom arm that features the text "Rode Procaster". As the scene progresses, the man looks toward someone off-screen to his right, speaking with an animated expression. His mouth opens and closes as he talks, and he gestures with his right hand, which is partially visible and tattooed. His facial expression shifts from a slight smile to a look of surprise, with his eyebrows raised and mouth open. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up while he interacts with an unseen person.
